dialogos.texto_en: Ahh... I'm so tired...
I'm exhausted too...\nI never thought I'd be this nervous.
When I imagined my wedding I didn't feel nervous at all.\nThat was unexpected.
Reality is something else, though.\nThings don't always go as planned.
Anyway, we made it through somehow. Good job, Nino.
You too, Futaro.
...Looking back, my relationship with you\nwasn't exactly what I had imagined.
Haha, that's probably true.
But, that's what made it great.\nI loved you in my own unique way.
Predictability is boring.\nWe had an unconventional romance.
Hey, don't you think so?
Yeah.\nYou always managed to exceed my expectations.
Same goes for you, Futaro.
(An unconventional romance, huh?)
(I don't remember doing anything\n that surprised Nino, but she told me what surprised her.)
...Hey.\nDo you remember what happened at the school festival?
The school festival? There were a lot of things.\nWhich one are you talking about?
Well...
Obviously, I'm talking about what you did to me.
About our first kiss you initiated%p-2;――
It opened my eyes and evoked my feelings for you.
What's that supposed to mean?\nIt's like you've become the princess,\nand I become the prince.
I can't change your mind, if that's the way you're going to \nlook at it, huh?
That's right.\nI'm not the kind of princess who sits silently\nand waits for a kiss.
I'll make sure to do enough\nto awaken even a helpless prince.
Nino...\nThank you. I'm truly glad you're with me.
...No, it's me who should be saying that.\nI'm glad I met you, Futaro.
I'm coming in, Futaro.
Yeah, okay.
Good one.\nIt was truly a wonderful ceremony.
Big bro, Nino-san, great job.\nIt was incredibly beautiful.
My new father-in-law and my new little sister Raiha-chan.
Once again from this moment onwards, as a member of the \nUesugi family, I'll ask for your support.
Likewise. I'm countin' on you.
Please take care of big bro as well.
Yes, leave Futaro to me.
Make sure you keep that boy in line, now!
Dad...
Dad.\nAbout the shop you lent us.\nI've decided to leave it to Miku.
I apologize for it\nbecoming a half-hearted arrangement.
Don't sweat it.\nYou got your own path to follow, Nino-chan.
Thank you very much.
I also intend to help out at the shop\neven more from now on.\nPlease go to my big bro's place with peace of mind.
Okay.\nTake care of Miku for me.
By the way%p-2;――
Futaro!\nIt seems even Maruo has admitted you as his son-in-law.\nThat's great, isn't it?
Huh?
Daddy admitted Futaro?
You heard about that, old man?
Just happened to overhear it.
We still have a long way to go.
We have to live joyfully everyday \nto earn your Dad's recognition for sure.\nUntil then, we'll have to give it our best shot.
Futaro...
Heh...\nYou've become a very fine man, my son.
But I'll always be better than you!\nGahaha!
Dad, stop.
I came to get your suit, big bro.\nGive it back to me and I'll return it.
Thanks, Raiha.
See you later, then!
...Hey.\nWhat did Daddy say to you, Futaro?
Ah...\nIt's hard to put it into words.
Your father wants you to be happy.
But, you know that, of course.
...Yeah.
Sorry, maybe I shouldn't have asked. It's probably something \nthat should be kept between Dad and Futaro.
Wait a sec! Is it really ok?\nFutaro seemed so nervous\nthat he almost messed up the kiss during the vow.
I hope Dad wasn't disappointed by that.
Th-that couldn't be helped, you know!\nEveryone was watching...
Besides, for me, it was like a final exam.
Teehee!\nYou were worried about that all along.
I told you, my grading is strict.
Even so, I had no idea that I wouldn't receive a perfect score \nup to today.
Anyway, how was it?
Do you really want to be rated based on such a nervously \nperformed kiss?
I was nervous, but%p-2;――%p; it was special to me.
You know what? I vow that, everyday from now on,\nwe'll be living a happy life together.
I double that.
No matter what happens,\nI'll live my life with you, Futaro.\nThat's my vow.
So, of course%p-2;――
